UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ksenia Tsenin; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jason Cheng is present.
Attorney Travis Bonnheim representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Nov-19-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
